原文摘要: We propose Mamba-2, a new architecture that uses state space duality to achieve Transformer-level performance on language modeling tasks while maintaining linear time complexity. Our theoretical framework connects state space models and attention mechanisms through a unified duality perspective.

We introduce RAG-Fusion, a novel approach that improves retrieval-augmented generation systems through multi-query expansion and reciprocal rank fusion. Our method significantly outperforms standard RAG on knowledge-intensive tasks.

标题: Scaling Laws for Reward Model Overoptimization
原文摘要: We study the phenomenon of reward model overoptimization in RLHF training. Our findings suggest that larger reward models are more robust to overoptimization, and we propose a scaling law to predict optimal stopping points.

标题: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model
原文摘要: We propose Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), a simple method for fine-tuning language models from human preferences without explicit reward modeling. DPO is stable, efficient, and achieves comparable performance to RLHF.

标题: Mixture of Experts: A Comprehensive Survey
原文摘要: This survey reviews the Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture and its applications in large language models. We analyze routing strategies, load balancing, and scaling properties of modern MoE systems.
